title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.120 - What law to be issue for the court
text:
490.120.  What law to be issue for the court. — The law of a jurisdiction other than those referred to in section 490.080 shall be an issue for the court, but shall not be subject to the foregoing provisions concerning judicial notice.
(L. 1949 p. 318 § 6)
